citations.desc: Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).
citations.narrative:
The IACUC last inspected the animal facilities and reviewed the facility's program for humane care and use of animals in
May of 2025. At least once every six months, the IACUC must review the faculty's program for humane care and use of
animals and inspect all the animal facilities where animals are housed or used. A prepared report of its evaluations must
be created and sent to the Institutional Official of the research facility as well as be available to an APHIS official at time of
inspection. IACUC reviews and inspections assure the well being and proper care of all the animals.
*****Correct by May 1, 2026

The research facility did not submit their FY 2025 Annual Report until 1/9/26. All registered facilities must submit an
annual report to the Deputy Administrator on or before December 1 of each calendar year. The report shall cover the
previous Fiscal Year and is necessary to inform the Institutional Official and the USDA of the scope and extent of the
animal use at the facility. The annual report shall include the numbers of live animals the facility used or intends to use in
research, tests, experiments or for teaching. The facility must correct this issue.
*****Correct by December 1, 2026 for submission of FY 2026 report
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.31(c) 
   
Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC). 
The IACUC last inspected the animal facilities and reviewed the facility's program for humane care and use of animals in 
May of 2025. At least once every six months, the IACUC must review the faculty's program for humane care and use of 
animals and inspect all the animal facilities where animals are housed or used. A prepared report of its evaluations must 
be created and sent to the Institutional Official of the research facility as well as be available to an APHIS official at time of 
inspection. IACUC reviews and inspections assure the well being and proper care of all the animals. 
*****Correct by May 1, 2026 
2.36 
   
Annual report. 
The research facility did not submit their FY 2025 Annual Report until 1/9/26. All registered facilities must submit an 
annual report to the Deputy Administrator on or before December 1 of each calendar year. The report shall cover the 
previous Fiscal Year and is necessary to inform the Institutional Official and the USDA of the scope and extent of the 
animal use at the facility. The annual report shall include the numbers of live animals the facility used or intends to use in 
research, tests, experiments or for teaching. The facility must correct this issue. 
*****Correct by December 1, 2026 for submission of FY 2026 report 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
